phrases.intent_en: Ask where Palau de la Música is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿cómo llego al Palau de la Música?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, KOH-moh YEH-goh al pah-LOW deh lah MOO-see-kah?

likely_response.local: Siga el río hacia el este cinco minutos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah EHL RÍ-oh ah-THEE-ah EHL EH-steh THEEN-koh mee-NOO-tohs
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the river east for five minutes.

responses.english: Follow the river east for five minutes.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah EHL RÍ-oh ah-THEE-ah EHL EH-steh THEEN-koh mee-NOO-tohs
responses.french: Siga el río hacia el este cinco minutos.

phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿cuál es la entrada más cercana?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, dees-KOOL-peh, KWAH-leh eh lah en-TRAH-dah mahs ser-KAH-nah?

likely_response.local: La puerta de Aragón está a dos minutos.
likely_response.pronunciation: LAH poo-EHR-tah DEH ah-rah-GÓN EHSTÁ AH DOHS mee-NOO-tohs
likely_response.translation_en: The Aragón gate is two minutes away.

responses.english: The Aragón gate is two minutes away.
responses.phonetic: LAH poo-EHR-tah DEH ah-rah-GÓN EHSTÁ AH DOHS mee-NOO-tohs
responses.french: La puerta de Aragón está a dos minutos.

phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde puedo alquilar bicicletas por aquí cerca?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh al-kee-LAR bee-see-KLEH-tahs por ah-KEE SEH-krah?

likely_response.local: Junto al puente de Aragón, a 200 metros.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL poo-EHN-teh DEH ah-rah-GÓN AH MEHT-rohs
likely_response.translation_en: There is a rental point further ahead.

responses.english: There is a rental point further ahead.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL poo-EHN-teh DEH ah-rah-GÓN AH MEHT-rohs
responses.french: Junto al puente de Aragón, a 200 metros.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if sports equipment is available
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿disponen de equipamiento deportivo para alquilar?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, dees-POH-nen deh eh-kee-pah-MYEHN-toh deh-POR-tee-voh PAH-rah al-kee-LAR?

likely_response.translation_en: There is no service available here.

responses.english: There is no service available here.
